description: A secure, local-first MCP server exposing ArcGIS Pro's ArcPy engine over stdio JSON-RPC.
name: io.github.muend/arcgis-mcp-bridge

environmentVariables.description: Path to the licensed ArcGIS Pro Python interpreter or cloned arcgis-mcp-env interpreter.
environmentVariables.name: ARCPY_PYTHON_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional semicolon-separated PathGuard boundary roots for local GIS data.
environmentVariables.name: ARCGIS_MCP_ALLOWED_ROOTS

environmentVariables.description: Optional default output workspace. If set, it must point to an existing file geodatabase.
environmentVariables.name: ARCGIS_MCP_SCRATCH_GDB

environmentVariables.description: Optional maximum number of concurrent ArcPy worker subprocesses. Defaults to 2.
environmentVariables.name: ARCGIS_MCP_MAX_WORKERS

title: ArcGIS MCP Bridge
